falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes above 5000 (a key resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a strong upward trend, contradicting the pattern's historical bottom context.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the NYSE Advance-Decline Line surges above +5000 (historical overbought threshold)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal extreme bullish momentum, directly contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by proving a clear trend rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Index drops below 12 (a historically significant 'low volatility' threshold) for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sustained drop would falsify the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating market complacency, invalidating the pattern's implied volatility context.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
